name: bio-model-project-static
description: This repository contains the source code for an interactive web-based 3D model of the Earth's Carbon Cycle. It was originally developed as a final project for a high school biology class at Clovis West High School by William Chou. The application provides a visual representation of the carbon cycle, comparing primitive Earth to present-day Earth, and detailing key biological processes like photosynthesis and cellular respiration.
